title: 有馬記念の後に・ジューショー？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is finally able to enter the Arima
Kinen, and as expected, she loses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says she enjoyed the race, but at the same
time, she feels different from usual...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to understand what exactly is making her
feel this way, she decides to re-enter the Arima
Kinen next year.
